steps.title: Separate the two clauses
steps.content: The first independent clause is "Philosopher Peter Kivy was a leading figure in musical aesthetics." The following "As evidenced by" phrase introduces support for a second independent clause about Kivy's formalist approach.

steps.title: Use a full stop
steps.content: Choice A fuses the clauses. Choice B creates an awkward coordination without the needed sentence boundary. Choice C uses a comma splice. A period cleanly ends the first clause and lets the evidence phrase introduce the next sentence. The answer is D.
